---
toc: false 
---

# <span style="color: #022044; display: block; text-align: center;text-decoration: underline;">About Me<span/>

```{=html}
<img src="pictures/IMG_0262.jpeg"
     alt="Headshot" 
     width="400" 
     style="display:inline-block; float: left; margin:0 30px 10px 0; border: 8px solid #2F0407; border-radius: 15px;">
```


Hi, I’m Paris Stroud, a public health professional specializing in environmental health and sustainability.
I love analyzing data to develop solutions that help communities thrive. My work combines data analysis and hands-on initiatives to promote health, equity, and sustainability.


<!--To publish updates run this in the terminal

# Render the site locally
quarto render

# Stage all changes (source files)
git add .

# Commit with a timestamped message
git commit -m "Update site $(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" || echo "No changes to commit"

# Push source files to main branch
git push origin main

# Publish to GitHub Pages via gh-pages branch
quarto publish gh-pages

--!>
